title: Workdocs Text Formatting Upgrade
excerpt: Currently there are a set of options for formatting your text in the Monday Workdocs, but they are limited. Having the ability to change the font size of a single line of text or selected text only would be extremely ben…

posts.author: Breezy_Mo (Briana Moser)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently there are a set of options for formatting your text in the Monday Workdocs, but they are limited. Having the ability to change the font size of a single line of text or selected text only would be extremely beneficial. And rather than only having 3 title size settings and “Normal” text size options, we should be able to choose from an expanded list of font sizes, like you can in Word. We shouldn’t have to pay extra for an integration or install an app to have more of the basic text formatting options out there. Text effects, custom color options, different font family options, all should be included font formatting functionalities within Monday workdocs.

For a short term solution, even adding a “Disclaimer” sizing option would be a nice addition, for text information that doesn’t need to be as prominent as the rest of your normal sized text.
